summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Negged CardGen app with all 13 brands. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly after minor frontend restart to fix cached page title.
passed_tests: GET /api/brands returns all 13 brands correctly (including 7 new brands)
POST /api/generate/{brand_id} generates valid codes for all 13 brands
Homepage displays 'NEGGED CARDGEN' branding (not 'Gift Card Generator')
How does this work? explanation section is visible and complete
All 13 brand cards render correctly with proper icons and names
Generate/Regenerate buttons work for all brands including new ones (uber_eats, coles, woolworths, seven_eleven, shein, cotton_on, forever_new)
Copy to clipboard functionality works correctly
Stats counter increments correctly after each generation
Code formats match expected patterns for all brands
New brands (Uber Eats, Coles, Woolworths, 7-Eleven, Shein, Cotton On, Forever New) display and function properly
Brand card hover effects and animations work correctly
Error handling works for invalid brand requests
